examples: Inference, which includes apodictic inference and probable inference, is the chief thought pattern of ascertaining case quality.
Let this be a lesson to us, that in other countries you cannot get around the law. You have to contend that they are apodictic in implementing the law.
He likes to superimpose a trelliswork of latinate formulations (grids of the apodictic, the epistemological, the asymptotic) upon the subject at hand.
